nasb.text: But the Lord is the true God; He is the living God and the everlasting King. At His wrath the earth quakes, And the nations cannot endure His indignation.

esv.text: But the Lord is the true God; he is the living God and the everlasting King. At his wrath the earth quakes, and the nations cannot endure his indignation.

cnv.text: 只有耶和華是真神； 他是永活的　神，是永遠的君王。 他一發怒，大地就震動， 萬國都不能承受他的忿怒。

ccb.text: 唯有耶和华是真神， 是永活的上帝， 是永恒的君王。 祂一发怒，大地便震动， 万国都无法承受。
